headline: GDV returned 42% in a year by betting on dividend anchors like JPMorgan and Amex
summary: Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust (NYSE:GDV) trades around $28 and has returned 42% over the past year, a number that tells you something important before you even look at the income. This closed-end fund launched in November 2003 with $2.9 billion in total net assets and seeks high total return with an emphasis on dividends ... GDV returned 42% in a year by betting on dividend anchors like JPMorgan and Amex
